name: Chile Pepper Jamaican Jerk Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the pimento berries in a dry skillet until they are fragrant, about 2 minutes.
2. Remove and crush them to a powder in a mortar or spice mill.
3. Place all the ingredients in a blender or food processor and puree to make a sauce.
4. Store in the refrigerator; it will keep for a month or more.
